title: citrus × aurantium var. myrtifolia
intro: Citrus × aurantium var. myrtifolia, also known as bitter orange, is a variety of the bitter orange tree, a hybrid of the sour orange and the citron. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium var. myrtifolia include reducing symptoms of anxiety and depression, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in weight loss. Citrus × aurantium var. myrtifolia can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or capsule, and is often used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
